name: Tailscale Terminated Accounts Still Active
description: Detects terminated employees that still have active access in tailscale.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login_name AS email, e.termination_date FROM tailscale_users u JOIN employees e ON LOWER(COALESCE(u.login_name, '')) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded')
remediation: Disable or remove provider access for terminated employees within 24 hours and verify all active sessions are revoked.
